title: Advanced Keep Inventory - AKI
description: Smart keep inventory with custom item drops, world control, penalties, PvP rewards, anti-abuse.
body:
# AdvancedKeepInventory - AKI

A fully customizable keep-inventory plugin designed for Minecraft 1.21

AdvancedKeepInventory gives server owners complete control over:
- Item drop & keep rules
- PvP money transfer
- EXP penalties
- Anti-abuse protection
- Per-world configuration
- MiniMessage display formatting

---

## Features

### Per-World Configuration
Each world can have independent rules.
Respect Vanilla `/gamerule keepInventory` or override it.

### Advanced Inventory Control
Define drop/keep rules using:
- Categories (Sword, Armor, Food, etc.)
- Specific materials (DIAMOND, IRON_INGOT, etc.)
- CustomModelData items (plugin-based items)

Priority system: custom-items > items > categories
If an item matches both drop and keep → KEEP wins.

---

### PvP Money System (Vault / PlayerPoints)
- Victim loses a configurable percentage of balance
- Optional maximum loss cap
- Money can be transferred directly to the killer (PvP only)
- Fully configurable

---

### Anti-Abuse Protection
- Cooldown for killing the same player
- Minimum victim balance requirement

---

### EXP Management
- Configurable EXP percentage loss
- Apply only on:
  - PLAYER (PvP)
  - MOB (PvE)
  - NATURAL (environmental death)

---

### Flexible Message Display
Supports MiniMessage formatting.

Display types:
- Chat
- ActionBar
- Title
- BossBar

Fully configurable per message.

---

## Requirements

- Vault (optional, for money support)
- PlayerPoints (optional)
